content: *도구, 일반* {color="gray"} --- **무게:** 6 lbs **가치:** 8 GP --- **능력:** 근력 {color="red"} **활용:** 문이나 용기의 봉인 또는 열기 (DC 20) {color="red"} **제작:** [곤봉](/212f7f5a1e80816db7aad12f932ac773?pvs=25), [대형 곤봉](/212f7f5a1e8081eebb90f0b0f3304dc6?pvs=25), [육척봉](/212f7f5a1e8081aa9c12cd3e70467b2b?pvs=25), [통](/212f7f5a1e80811e9d82ce6df182d757?pvs=25), [상자](/212f7f5a1e8081bf953cdd5ec67d8a96?pvs=25), [사다리](/212f7f5a1e80819daadee62b12f9ad15?pvs=25), [장대](/212f7f5a1e808141923be2f45ad6ef21?pvs=25), [휴대용 파성추](/212f7f5a1e808116ade6d5d41ed8a57d?pvs=25), [횃불](/212f7f5a1e8081b68747cc7dd4de95ae?pvs=25) {color="red"}
